org.arakhne.neteditor.io

Interface NetEditorWriter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractNetEditorWriter, AbstractXMLWriter, GMLWriter, GraphMLWriter, GXLWriter, NGRWriter

    public interface NetEditorWriter
    This interface represents a writer of NetEditor files.
    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Progression getProgression()
      Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
      ResourceRepository getResourceRepository()
      Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
      String getWriterVersion()
      Replies the version of the writer.
      boolean isAnchorOutput()
      Replies if this writer is outputing the anchors in addition to the graph structure composed of the nodes and the edges.
      void setAnchorOutput(boolean anchorOutput)
      Set if this writer is outputing the anchors in addition to the graph structure composed of the nodes and the edges.
      void setProgression(Progression model)
      Set the task progression model used by this reader.
      void setResourceRepository(ResourceRepository repos)
      Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
      void write(OutputStream os, Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
      Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
      void write(OutputStream os, Graph<?,?,?,?> graph)
      Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, but not the view objects.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      void      		 write(OutputStream os, G graph, ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
      Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.

    • Method Detail

      • getProgression

        Progression getProgression()
        Replies the task progression model used by this reader.
        Returns:
        the task progression model.

      • setProgression

        void setProgression(Progression model)
        Set the task progression model used by this reader.
        Parameters:
        model - is the task progression model.

      • getWriterVersion

        String getWriterVersion()
        Replies the version of the writer.
        Returns:
        the version of the writer.

      • write

        void write(OutputStream os,
         Graph<?,?,?,?> graph)
           throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, but not the view objects.
        Parameters:
        os - is the stream to write in.
        graph - is the graph to export in the stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(OutputStream os,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
           throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
        Parameters:
        os - is the stream to write in.
        graph - is the graph to export in the stream.
        container - is the figure container from which figures may be extracted.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        void write(OutputStream os,
         Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
           throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
        Parameters:
        os - is the stream to write in.
        figures - are the figures to output, and linked to the graph to output. The list is sorted from the front layer to the background layer.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • isAnchorOutput

        boolean isAnchorOutput()
        Replies if this writer is outputing the anchors in addition to the graph structure composed of the nodes and the edges.
        Returns:
        true if the anchors are output; false otherwise.

      • setAnchorOutput

        void setAnchorOutput(boolean anchorOutput)
        Set if this writer is outputing the anchors in addition to the graph structure composed of the nodes and the edges.
        Parameters:
        anchorOutput - is true if the anchors are output; false otherwise.

      • getResourceRepository

        ResourceRepository getResourceRepository()
        Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
        Returns:
        the resource repository.

      • setResourceRepository

        void setResourceRepository(ResourceRepository repos)
        Replies the resource repository used by this writer.
        Parameters:
        repos - the resource repository.
